zh.Saint Andrew's Church, Curry Rivel, Sout: 英國英格蘭薩默塞特加里 利維爾聖 安德也斯 邱奇
zh.Curry Rivel, Somerset, England, United K: 英國英格蘭薩默塞特加里 利維爾
zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir Henry II de Lorty於大約1200年出生在英國英格蘭薩默塞特加里 利維爾時，他的父親E William LORTY ORTI24歲，母親Mrs E William LORTY ORTI22歲。他和Sabine Revel至少有2個兒子和1個女兒。他去世於1321年在他的家鄉享年122歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭薩默塞特加里 利維爾聖 安德也斯 邱奇。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sir Henry II de Lorty于大约1200年出生在英国英格兰薩默塞特加里 利維爾时，他的父亲E William LORTY ORTI24岁，母亲Mrs E William LORTY ORTI22岁。他和Sabine Revel至少有2个儿子和1个女儿。他去世于1321年在他的家乡享年122岁，埋葬在英国英格兰薩默塞特加里 利維爾聖 安德也斯 邱奇。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Lorty
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Lortz
meanings: North German (also Lörtz): from a shortened form of the personal name Lorenz .

nameMeanings.name: Henry
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: A perennially popular given name, of Continental Germanic origin, from haim ‘home’ + rīc ‘power, ruler’. It was an Old French name, adopted by the Normans and introduced by them to Britain. It has been borne by eight kings of England. Not until the 17th century did the form Henry (as opposed to Harry ) become the standard vernacular form, mainly under the influence of the Latin form Henricus and French Henri.

nameMeanings.name: II
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

en.lifeSummary: When Sir Henry II de Lorty was born about 1200, in Curry Rivel, Somerset, England, United Kingdom, his father, E William LORTY ORTI, was 24 and his mother, Mrs E William LORTY ORTI, was 22. He had at least 2 sons and 1 daughter with Sabine Revel. He died in 1321, in his hometown, at the age of 122, and was buried in St Andrew's Church, Curry Rivel, Somerset, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir Henry II de Lorty est né environ 1200, à Curry Rivel, Somerset, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, E William LORTY ORTI, avait 24 ans et sa mère, Mrs E William LORTY ORTI, avait 22 ans. Il a eu au moins 2 fils et 1 fille avec Sabine Revel. Il est décédé en 1321, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 122 ans, et a été enterré à St Andrew's Church, Curry Rivel, Somerset, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.Curry Rivel, Somerset, England, United K: Curry Rivel, Somerset, England, United Kingdom
de.lifeSummary: Als Sir Henry II de Lorty um 1200 in Curry Rivel, Somerset, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater E William LORTY ORTI 24 und seine Mutter Mrs E William LORTY ORTI 22. Er hatte mit Sabine Revel mindestens 2 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Er starb 1321 im Alter von 122 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort und wurde in St Andrew's Church, Curry Rivel, Somerset, England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Henry II de Lorty è nato il circa 1200 nel Curry Rivel, Somerset, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, il suo padre, E William LORTY ORTI, aveva 24 anni e il suo madre, Mrs E William LORTY ORTI, aveva 22 anni. Lui avuto almeno 2 figli e 1 figlia con Sabine Revel. Morì nel 1321, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 122 anni, e fu sepolto a St Andrew's Church, Curry Rivel, Somerset, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.Saint Andrew's Church, Curry Rivel, Sout: イギリスイギリスソメルセトクウリー リベルスト アンドリュー'ス チャーチ

ja.lifeSummary: Sir Henry II de Lortyが約1200年にイギリスイギリスソメルセトクウリー リベルで生まれた時，父E William LORTY ORTIは24歳，母Mrs E William LORTY ORTIは22歳であった。彼はSabine Revelとの間に少なくとも2人の息子と1人の娘をもうけた。彼は1321年に故郷で122歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスソメルセトクウリー リベルスト アンドリュー'ス チャーチにて埋葬された。

ko.Saint Andrew's Church, Curry Rivel, Sout: 영국 잉글랜드 서머세트 커리 라이벨 스트 앤드루'스 c후르치
ko.lifeSummary: Sir Henry II de Lorty(이)가 대략 1200년 영국 잉글랜드 서머세트 커리 라이벨에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 E William LORTY ORTI(은)는 24세였고, 그의 어머니 Mrs E William LORTY ORTI(은)는 22세였다. 그는 Sabine Revel(와)과 적어도 두 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1321년 그의 고향에서 122세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 서머세트 커리 라이벨 스트 앤드루'스 c후르치에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Henry II de Lorty nasceu aproximadamente 1200, em Curry Rivel, Somerset, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, E William LORTY ORTI, tinha 24 anos e sua mãe, Mrs E William LORTY ORTI, tinha 22 anos. Ele teve pelo menos 2 filhos e 1 filha com Sabine Revel. Ele faleceu em 1321, em sua cidade natal, com 122 anos, e foi sepultado em St Andrew's Church, Curry Rivel, Somerset, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.Saint Andrew's Church, Curry Rivel, Sout: ст андрю'с чурч, курри ривел, сомирсет, Англия, Великобритания
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir Henry II de Lorty родился около 1200 г. в местности курри ривел, сомирсет, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени E William LORTY ORTI было 24 года, а матери, которую звали Mrs E William LORTY ORTI, 22. У него было по крайней мере 2 сына и 1 дочь от Sabine Revel. Он умер в 1321 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 122 лет и был похоронен в местности ст андрю'с чурч, курри ривел, сомирсет, Англия, Великобритания.
